---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who hits it (which role, which module)?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Mandate fit

Check the [Platform Mandate](../../docs/Platform-Mandate.md) and confirm this proposal:

- [ ] Works for **any tenant**, not just dcica (no hardcoded org assumptions)
- [ ] Stores **no PHI/HIT**
- [ ] Works on a **6" phone** if volunteer-facing
- [ ] Tenant-specific behavior is **configuration**, not hardcoded

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples.
